item.title: Version 1.0.0 — Stay in flow. Talk anywhere you type.
item.description:
Abalone Flow 1.0.0

Stay in flow. Talk anywhere you type.

Hold a key, speak, release. Your words appear at the cursor — in any app, any field, anywhere on your Mac.

  • Faster than typing. Streaming transcription puts words on screen as you speak them.
  • Private by design. Everything runs on your Mac. Your voice never leaves it.
  • Free. No caps. No weekly limits. No subscription. No account.
  • Near-perfect accuracy. ~97% on clean English, with punctuation and capitalization.
  • Everywhere you work. Claude Code, Mail, Slack, Obsidian, Linear — if you can type there, you can speak there.

Requires macOS 14 Sonoma or later. Apple Silicon recommended.
